spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: No CIO identified publicly. Very lean 762-person workforce. Formed from merger 2022 — IT integration phase likely complete. No AI programs, cloud platforms, or technology partnerships publicly identified. Williston Basin focused — lower technology intensity than Permian operators. Score 5 — well below threshold.
spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: HQ Houston TX — within WWT STOLA territory. No channel conflict.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $5.25B. 762 employees — very lean. Formed from Oasis + Whiting merger July 2022. Revenue below $10B so OEM deduction does not apply. Clean Houston account with no MSP or CoE. No technology leadership or programs publicly identified. Confidence LOW. WWT opportunity: clean account in STOLA territory but limited near-term hook without known initiative or relationship.
